/CAL:TO SET, TRAILING #22000676/CONT/DOP/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE,THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSOCOMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THATTIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/INTC/SA2:THE AREA BOUNDED BY LARKIN, GEARY, STOCKTON, AND MARKET STS,, SF/

/CAL CJC PRG RPT AND PTC/INTC/CONTD CJC-DEJ PRG RPT/DOP/TEXT DEFERD ENTRY OF JDGMNT/AMEND:ADDING COUNT 4/DEF:WAIVES INTRUCTION AND ARRAIGNMENT ONCOUNT 4 /IRR/GTW/CPSS/IBARRA/REMA/ARBUCKLE/SA2:STAY AWAY 150 YARDS FROMTHE AREA OF 472 TURK ST EXCEPT TO ALLOW TO ATTEND COLLABORATIVE COURT, MEETCASE MANAGER AND FOLLOW TREATMENT PLAN/SAORD/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:4/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
